build.buildCommand: npm install --include=optional --no-audit --no-fund && PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=/root/.cache/puppeteer npx puppeteer browsers install chrome && npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/api && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r apps/api/dist/. dist/ && if [ -d python-service ]; then PY_ROOT=python-service; else PY_ROOT=.; fi; python3 -m venv $PY_ROOT/.venv && $PY_ROOT/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && $PY_ROOT/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r $PY_ROOT/requirements.txt

deploy.releaseCommand: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma || echo '[release] prisma migrate deploy failed; continuing startup'
